headerDisplay: Renders any TRMNL/Terminus extension as a HomeKit camera. Each entry below becomes one camera accessory.

terminusBaseUrl.title: Terminus base URL
terminusBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the self-hosted Terminus instance (e.g. http://vanessapi.tail9a4f0.ts.net:2300).

terminusEmail.title: Terminus account email
terminusEmail.description: Login email for the Terminus account used to trigger renders.

terminusPassword.title: Terminus account password
terminusPassword.description: Login password for the Terminus account used to trigger renders.

label.title: Name
label.description: Accessory name shown in the Home app.

terminusExtensionId.title: Terminus extension ID
terminusExtensionId.description: The numeric ID of the Terminus extension to render (visible in its URL, e.g. /extensions/12).

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to trigger a fresh render and refresh the cached snapshot.

streamFps.title: Stream framerate
streamFps.description: Framerate advertised for live view streaming of the (static) rendered frame.
